svg.title: Glide OS layer contract v2
svg.desc: Eight-layer architecture with thinking types and event flow, showing the updated split of Constraint and Routing layers, new Memory layer, and Kernel at the base.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Intent layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Desire Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Constraint layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Ethical Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Routing layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Routing Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Execution layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Procedural Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Generative layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Generative Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Observation layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Meta Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Memory layer write-protection rule in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Experiential Thinking in Glide OS?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Kernel layer in Glide OS')
sendPrompt('What is Physical Reality in Glide OS?')

svg.text: Memory write rule: only approved execution may write · memory never self-writes
Event producers → EventBus → Dispatcher (interrupt) → TaskQueue → Runtime
Sources: UI · Scheduler tick · Memory write · Reflection · External API · Human action
